chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2125 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.05.2022 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G Sindh *** This petition is pending since 2013 for the following reliefs: (a) That this Honourable Court may be to direct the respondent No.1 and 2 to hold the enquiry and taken stern action against respondents No.3 to 5 and other delinquents. (b) That this Honourable Court may be pleased to direct the respondents No.3 and 4 to terminate the lease deed dated 2.11.2011 Registration No.5672 within the meaning section 31 and reference be made under Sindh Katchi Abadi Authority, (Registration, Improvement and Development Regulations 1993. (c) Any other relief which this Honourable Court may deed fit and proper be awarded. The subject document, sought to be cancelled, is a registered instrument before the Sub-Registrar concerned. We are afraid that such registered instrument cannot be cancelled (terminated) under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. In case petitioner has not sought any relief with regard to land in question for himself, he may approach civil forum having jurisdiction in this regard. Petition is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
